channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI Code Tools Beat Junior Devs
item.description: AI tools now write cleaner, faster, more secure code than most junior developers. Real benchmarks, tool comparisons, and when to avoid them.

item.title: Beat Algos
item.description: Beat social media algorithms with high-quality content

item.title: Platform Engineering: Beyond Internal Tooling
item.description: Internal developer platforms reduce cognitive load by 50%+—here’s how we cut onboarding from 4.2 days to 37 minutes using Backstage, Argo CD, and OPA.

item.title: Open Source Projects That Made Millions: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Open Source Projects That Made Millions covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Why Junior Dev Roles Are Vanishing
item.description: Junior dev jobs are vanishing not because of AI, but due to rising system complexity and broken onboarding. Real data, tools, and a path forward.

item.title: Terminal Mastery: Beyond Basic CLI Hacks
item.description: Terminal productivity isn't about shortcuts—it's reducing cognitive load. Real numbers, tools, and a contrarian take on why your shell setup might be holding you back.

item.title: Building WhatsApp-Like Chats That Scale
item.description: How WhatsApp-scale chat systems work: real-time delivery, E2E encryption, and performance numbers from production systems.

item.title: VC Insights
item.description: VC funding insights for tech startups

item.title: Shard Smart
item.description: Database sharding for scalability and performance

item.title: ShortURL
item.description: Design a URL shortener that handles billions of requests

item.title: AI Finance
item.description: AI finance tools analyze data, predict stock prices

item.title: WebSocket Power
item.description: WebSocket-based apps achieve 10-20ms latency

item.title: Solo SaaS
item.description: Solo developers can build successful SaaS products by prioritizing simplicity and focusing on customer needs

item.title: Apple's Pricing Edge
item.description: Apple's pricing strategy is rooted in its ability to create a seamless user experience

item.title: DB Tools
item.description: Essential database tools for optimizing performance and reducing downtime

item.title: Cross-Platform
item.description: Cross-platform vs native development trade-offs

item.title: Data Shield
item.description: Protect user data from corporations with encryption, access controls, and secure storage

item.title: Design Like Pro
item.description: System design interview tips and best practices

item.title: API Cash
item.description: Twilio and Stripe's API revenue models

item.title: AB Test
item.description: A/B testing for business metrics optimization
